message:
fix: skip Graphviz dot layout for all-absolute-positioned graphs

Root cause: Graphviz dot engine hangs indefinitely on dense graphs where
all nodes have absolute x/y positions. The dot engine still runs full
Sugiyama ranking even when positions are predetermined, entering a
pathological infinite loop (98% CPU for hours). This cannot be fixed with
pos="x,y!" pinning (dot ignores it) or splines changes (ortho, polyline,
line, false all hang). neato -n2 would work but neato isn't linked.

Fix: when all shape nodes have absX/absY, bypass Graphviz entirely and
compute orthogonal edge routes in TypeScript. WASM validation still runs
to detect overlaps. Graphviz is still used for all row/col-based layouts.
